event_blocks.summary: The video commences with a black screen and intensifying ethereal, sci-fi-like synth music, introducing the animated 'MARATHON MEDIA' logo, a Zodiak Entertainment Company, in bold red and white text, alongside details of a French-Italian co-production and international financing. The scene shifts to a glowing, futuristic cityscape under a starlit sky, featuring the 'HOLLYWOOD' sign on a hillside as the music transitions to an upbeat, rock-like tempo. A vibrant concert venue emerges, populated by an animated, diverse crowd of fans waving sparklers and cheering excitedly under colorful stage lights, their shouts of "Rob!" and "We love you, Rob!" audible over the energetic rock music. The perspective moves backstage to a dimly lit area where band members are preparing, with a large poster of 'ROB' prominently displayed. Rob, a stylish young man with spiky black and blonde hair, green eyes, and a confident smirk, is shown wearing a black and orange jacket over a red shirt. He strikes a pose, turns to the camera with a playful expression, hand on his chin, then glances thoughtfully and mischievously to the side as a smooth, playful male voice says, "Hmm. Oh, hello there, handsome. Mwah! I hope my fans love your new look as much as I..." The music continues, blending urban nightlife, musical performance excitement, and playful intrigue.

Backstage Area.description: A dimly lit, industrial-style backstage space with musical equipment, posters, and a circular stage platform.

Hollywood Sign.description: A large, illuminated 'HOLLYWOOD' sign on a hillside, visible during the cityscape pan, set against a starry night sky.

Rob's Poster.description: A large, framed poster of Rob with the name 'ROB' in bold yellow letters, showing him in a dynamic pose with a confident expression.

Band Members.description: A group of animated musicians backstage, including a guitarist, drummer, and a character in a top hat and cape, preparing for a performance.

Rob.description: A charismatic young male character with spiky black and blonde hair, green eyes, and a confident smirk, wearing a black and orange jacket over a red shirt. He is seen posing backstage, exuding a rock-star persona, and is the subject of enthusiastic crowd chants of 'Rob!' and 'We love you, Rob!'. He is also playfully addressed as 'handsome' by a smooth male voice, implying his star status and a close relationship with the speaker.

Concert Crowd.description: An animated crowd of diverse fans holding sparklers, cheering under colorful stage lights in a large venue, vocally expressing their excitement by shouting 'Rob!' and 'We love you, Rob!'.

Marathon Media Logo.description: A red and white animated logo with the text 'MARATHON MEDIA' and 'A ZODIAK ENTERTAINMENT COMPANY' beneath it, appearing at the start of the video.

I hope my fans love your new look as much as I..." as the music continues, creating an atmosphere that blends urban nightlife with the excitement of a music performance and a hint of playful intrigue.

event_blocks.summary: Backstage, Rob, characterized by spiky black and blonde hair, green eyes, and a confident smirk, dons a black and orange jacket over a red shirt as a male voice says "I do" and a female voice greets him. Accompanied by a whooshing sound and building music, Rob walks past crew and equipment towards the stage. The scene transitions to a vibrant concert stage under a starry night sky where an announcer introduces "Rob Cutdrai" to a roaring Concert Crowd, who chant "We want Rob!" and wave sparklers. Energetic pop/rock music commences as Rob, now in a dazzling blue cape and top hat, performs dynamically, singing into a microphone and pointing to the crowd. He is joined by his Band Members—a pink-haired guitarist, a bassist in a cap, and a drummer—all situated on a Floating Platform above a sea of pink clouds, bathed in colorful lights and a massive rainbow arch. The Concert Crowd's energy peaks with shouts of "Go Rob!". Rob then walks back through the Backstage Area, now spotlighted, his expression turning pensive after a final "Fabulous!" as the music fades, reflecting on his performance.

event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit, blue-hued backstage area, a character in red pants and black boots walks confidently amidst upbeat, driving electronic music, punctuated by a "huh?" sound. The scene abruptly shifts to a wide aerial view of the Hollywood Sign under a starry night sky, the music persisting. Transitioning to a vibrant, sunlit cityscape with palm trees and colorful storefronts, pedestrians stroll and a red sports car speeds by, eliciting "whoa!" and "wow!" sounds. A young man with spiky black and blonde hair, clad in a blue tank top and yellow sneakers, walks down the street, while a blonde woman in a pink jacket and purple pants talks on her phone, urging, "Come on, Speedy, let's go for a walk!" The young man approaches a building with a large blue pool, encountering a girl in a red hoodie. He smiles confidently and gestures, and the surprised girl inquires, "Um, excuse me, I'm new in town. I was wondering if your gym offers Pilates classes?" The young man, in a dismissive and sarcastic tone, retorts, "For who? Your granny?" The girl utters an "Uh..." sound, and he continues, "Sweetie, this gym only offers the latest in cutting-edge training equipment." The bright, lively setting features clear skies and modern architecture, indicative of a bustling urban environment. On-screen text credits Vincent Chalvon-Demersay, David Michel, Michelle Lamoreaux, Robert Lamoreaux, and Pascal Jardin as creators, writers, and director.

event_blocks.summary: The scene opens with a digital heart rate monitor displaying '85' and a steady pulse, followed by a female voice exclaiming "Submersive hydrocycling!" accompanied by a "whoosh" sound and a rising heart rate. A split-screen shows a young woman in a pink hoodie looking anxious while a man in a blue tank top is submerged in a transparent water tank, his heart rate climbing to '112' amidst bubbles. A male voice announces "Zero-G Power Lifting!" with a "whoosh," leading to a strained "Oh!" and a "thud" and "gasp" from a female voice. A muscular man in a green tank top and yellow pants is seen lifting a barbell on a circular platform with a laptop and monitor, collapsing in exhaustion with a "thud" and "gasp," prompting a female voice to comment, "Wow, they sure take their workouts seriously around here!" The setting shifts to a bright, modern gym where the woman in the pink hoodie performs a visibly strained squat, observed by the man in the blue tank top from the doorway, with background gym sounds and a "ding." Transitioning outdoors to a city street, a high-angle view captures a woman in a red hoodie walking past a building with red awnings. She excitedly exclaims, "Cool, a bookstore! I can get all the reading materials I need for my new school!" and enters a modern, stylish boutique, the sound of footsteps echoing. Inside, she is greeted by a man in a black suit and red tie who presents her with a glowing, star-shaped ring. When the woman in the red hoodie asks, "Pardon me, can you tell me where you keep your books?" the man replies, "Oh, we don't carry books anymore. They scare the customers away. You know, print is so last century. But we do have these 24-karat gold bookmarks, pure silk runway-ready book bags, and of course, our five-star gourmet reading cafe." He then reveals a display of colorful, glowing rings, eliciting surprise and delight from her as she holds the ring and he gestures excitedly within the sleek, futuristic environment characterized by curved architecture, glass walls, and vibrant lighting.

event_blocks.summary: A vibrant city street scene with palm trees and colorful storefronts transitions to a swirling view of Earth from space before focusing on a bustling shopping district. A red-haired woman in a white top, green suspenders, and blue jeans, carrying a green purse with a pink flower, walks down the sidewalk. Inside a shoe store, a blonde woman in a pink top and purple skirt, admiring red high-heeled boots, gasps, 'No way! Even more blood, latest boots! They don't even carry those in my old hood. I have to have them!' She excitedly tries them on but is dismayed to see a blonde woman in a black dress holding the same pair. The blonde woman in pink politely asks for a size six and a half, but the blonde woman in black dismissively replies, 'All you need to know is that they're too expensive for you.' The blonde woman in pink reacts with indignation, 'That is like so rude! And so chic! I just love Beverly Hills!' The red-haired woman exits the store, disappointed, as upbeat electronic music continues. The scene shifts to a high-tech surveillance interface with multiple live city feeds, including close-ups of the women, accompanied by a suspenseful electronic score. A man in a purple uniform cleans a tall building's windows as an authoritative male voice announces, 'Assets will reach target in T-minus 10 seconds. Cluck cluck, the chickens have left the roost. I repeat, the chickens have left the roost.' He then states, 'Time to put operation Sushi Roll into effect,' and despite a hesitant question about certainty, confidently replies, 'Sure as tea time is 4 pm.' The video concludes with the blonde woman crossing the street with shopping bags as the camera pans out over the cityscape, blending urban life with a sense of surveillance as the suspenseful music fades.

event_blocks.summary: A man in a purple cap observes a surveillance interface displaying multiple feeds, including a blonde woman and a cityscape, as a robotic voice commands, "Activate chain of command." Simultaneously, a window cleaner in a blue uniform works on a tall building, and in a futuristic cockpit, two men in purple uniforms operate advanced controls with Earth visible outside. A satellite launches a rocket that crashes into a sushi restaurant sign, causing debris and glass to shatter. Three young women—one with red hair, one blonde, and one with black hair—are caught in the explosion, their shopping bags scattering. The impact also causes a pet store cage to fall, releasing a small pig that runs into the street. The women, dazed and surrounded by debris, express relief at their survival. Later, the same three women, now identified as Sam (Girl in Red Hoodie), Alex (Blonde Woman in Pink Jacket), and Clover (Red-Haired Woman), are seen clinging to a purple rope attached to a giant rolling object that has caused widespread destruction, including smashing the sushi sign and the pet store, from which the pig escaped. After the object moves away, they introduce themselves and decide to get milkshakes. In a separate scene, a woman named Mandy, driving a purple convertible, commands young men to wash her car and perform various tasks, even issuing a restraining order. The segment concludes with a view of a school courtyard and a man in a white uniform interacting with a girl in a pink dress.

Man in White Uniform and Hat.description: A man wearing a white uniform and hat, possibly a driver or attendant, who interacts with a girl in a pink dress near a car in the school courtyard.

Rob.description: A charismatic young male character with spiky black and blonde hair, green eyes, and a confident smirk, initially wearing a black and orange jacket over a red shirt backstage, later transformed into a dazzling blue cape and top hat during his stage performance, exuding rock-star energy, who is not visible in this segment.

They blush and develop heart-shaped eyes, and are heard responding subserviently to Mandy's commands, such as 'Yes, Mandy, right away!' and 'Anything you say, Mandy!'

Man in Black Suit and Red Tie.description: A young man with brown hair, wearing a black suit, white shirt, and red tie, who is not visible in this segment.

Woman with Long Black Hair and Purple Su.description: A woman with long black hair, wearing purple sunglasses and a white shirt, who drives a purple convertible and interacts flirtatiously with a group of young men. She is identified as 'Mandy' through her commanding and demanding dialogue, ordering the young men to perform tasks related to her car and expressing her displeasure when her 'restraining order' is violated.

Backstage Area.description: A dimly lit, industrial-style backstage space with musical equipment, posters, and a circular stage platform, where a character walks confidently before and after their performance, illuminated by spotlights, who is not visible in this segment.

Rob's Poster.description: A large, framed poster of Rob with the name 'ROB' in bold yellow letters, showing him in a dynamic pose with a confident expression, visible in the backstage area, who is not visible in this segment.

School Courtyard.description: A bright, sunny school courtyard with a large fountain, surrounded by white buildings with arched windows and green lawns, where students are casually walking and socializing.

Glowing Star Ring.description: A small, star-shaped ring with a glowing red center, presented by the man in the black suit to the girl in the red hoodie, emitting a bright light and drawing her attention, who is not visible in this segment.

Concert Crowd.description: An animated crowd of diverse fans holding sparklers, cheering under colorful stage lights in a large venue, shown in various states of excitement, with close-ups capturing their joyful expressions and raised hands, who is not visible in this segment.

Girl in Pink Dress.description: A girl with red hair, wearing a pink dress, who is seen interacting with the man in the white uniform and hat in the school courtyard.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a close-up of a man in a purple cap and jacket observing a high-tech surveillance interface, which displays multiple live feeds including a blonde woman, a robot, and a cityscape, all while a robotic voice commands, "Activate chain of command," amidst sci-fi tech whirring and beeping. The scene shifts to a man in a blue uniform, a window cleaner, suspended on ropes while cleaning a tall building’s windows, accompanied by subtle mechanical whirring. The narrative then transitions to a futuristic cockpit where two men in purple uniforms operate advanced controls, with a view of Earth from space, as intense sci-fi sounds build. A sleek satellite is shown orbiting Earth before launching a rocket from its front end with a powerful whoosh and rumble, ascending through the atmosphere, leaving a fiery trail. The rocket’s nose cone detaches and plummets toward a city, striking a large red and white sushi restaurant sign with a loud explosive impact, debris falling, and glass shattering. Three young women—one with red hair, one with blonde hair, and one with black hair—are seen shopping, reacting in shock with panicked exclamations like "Oh, sorry!" and "Okay!" as the sign crashes down. The explosion sends them tumbling, scattering their shopping bags, followed by screams and a confused "Huh?". The scene cuts to a pet store where a man and woman are startled by a loud crash and falling cage, which releases a small pig running into the street. Amidst more screams and a distinct "Oh no, my bag!", the final shot shows the three women on the ground, dazed and surrounded by debris and scattered shopping bags, as the city street remains chaotic in the aftermath, with one woman remarking, "We are so lucky we didn't just get pummeled!"

The scene opens on a sunny city street with colorful storefronts and palm trees, accompanied by tense background music. A Window Cleaner in a purple uniform is suspended, cleaning a tall building. Suddenly, a massive, green, cylindrical object, resembling a giant rolling log, crashes through the street with a loud impact, causing chaos. A female voice exclaims, "Oh no!" as the Sushi Restaurant Sign, a red and white sign shaped like a sushi roll, is shattered, prompting a sarcastic comment, "Even the sushi has attitude in Beverly Hills!" followed by a humorous suggestion, "Well, maybe it's just trying to get back to the ocean." Debris flies as the object rolls forward, knocking over a Pet Store and releasing a Small Pig, a pink pig with a collar, which draws a sympathetic, "Check out that poor little piggy!" from one of the onlookers. Pedestrians scatter in panic, with urgent shouts of "Run for it!" A man in a green shirt is knocked down. Three young women—a blonde in a pink top, a red-haired girl in a beige top, and a dark-haired girl in a red hoodie—rush to help, but the object continues rolling, eventually trapping them on top of it. They cling together in fear, with one exclaiming, "We're not the only ones in trouble!" and another urgently stating, "Come on! We gotta stop this thing before it turns all four of us into bacon!" The object rolls through the city at high speed, passing buildings and streets. From a high vantage point, a Mysterious Observer in a purple hat and coat watches through binoculars, with a Surveillance Interface displaying live feeds of the chaos. The girls, now clinging to a Purple Rope, are pulled along, their expressions shifting from terror to determination. They strategize, with one suggesting, "Okay, we're gonna need a long piece of rope," and the blonde woman offering, "Here! My belt!" as a solution. They discuss how to hook one end onto "the roll" and the other onto an "archway," with the red-haired girl confidently stating, "Well, I can handle the archway!" and another adding, "Yeah, no probs!" An excited "Killer move!" is heard before an urgent "Time to bail!" as the music intensifies and the scene ends with the girls still riding the object at high speed, the pig running ahead, and the observer watching intently.

The segment opens with a vibrant city street scene under a bright blue sky, featuring palm trees, colorful storefronts, and a yellow taxi, establishing a lively urban atmosphere. Intense, fast-paced orchestral music begins as a small pink pig with a blue collar, having escaped from a pet store, runs freely on the sidewalk. Suddenly, a massive green, cylindrical object, the Giant Rolling Object, resembling a giant log or monstrous creature, rolls through the street with sounds of destruction, glass shattering, and wood splintering, causing chaos. It smashes through a 'SUSHI' sign with a loud crash and then the pet store with a thud, scattering debris, while the Small Pig emits a high-pitched squeal. A young girl with short black hair, wearing a red hoodie with white trim and red pants, the Girl in Red Hoodie, rushes to rescue the pig, shouting "WHOA!" as she catches it just as the object continues its destructive path. She then clings to a long, flexible purple rope with a glowing ring at the end, which is attached to the rolling object, as she is pulled along amidst rushing wind sounds. The scene shifts to show the Girl in Red Hoodie, now holding the pig, standing with two other girls—a young woman with blonde hair in a pink top and purple belt, the Blonde Woman in Pink Jacket, and a young woman with long red hair in a beige top and green suspenders, the Red-Haired Woman—as they look up in shock at the chaos. The girls are later seen clinging to the Purple Rope, being dragged along by the rolling object, with the Girl in Red Hoodie holding the pig tightly, struggling amidst debris including broken sushi rolls and scattered objects. The music becomes lighter as the chaos subsides and the rolling object moves away, leaving a trail of destruction behind. The girls stand together, looking relieved and smiling. The Blonde Woman in Pink Jacket sighs, remarking, "Wow, that was a really close call!" to which the Red-Haired Woman adds, "Totally!" The Girl in Red Hoodie then suggests, "Yeah, um, I guess after that bizarre-o experience we should probably introduce ourselves. Um, I'm Sam." The Blonde Woman in Pink Jacket responds, "Hi, I'm Alex, and you guys rocked back there!" The Red-Haired Woman replies, "Thanks! I'm Clover. And aside from the major drama we just went through, it's a total pleasure to meet you both!" Sam then proposes, "Yeah, you know, we could go and have a ginger avocado milkshake to forget about our emotions," which Alex agrees to with an "Okay, good!" and Clover with a "Yeah!" The setting remains consistent with the city street, featuring the 'BEVERLY HILLS' archway, palm trees, and colorful buildings, under a clear sky, as an unidentified male voice concludes, "Very well."

The segment opens with a close-up of a purple rope and a green object on a sidewalk, near a vibrant city street. A female voice exclaims, "Oops, almost forgot! Accessories like these don't grow on trees!" The scene quickly shifts to a bustling urban environment where two girls walk near a café, as upbeat, energetic pop music with a driving beat begins. A dominant female voice, later identified as Mandy, declares, "Hello! I am not getting any younger, losers! That's more like it!" The camera pans to pedestrians crossing a street, including a girl in a green top, while cars like a red sports car and a purple convertible navigate the intersection. Mandy's voice continues, "You! Washing my whip!" A subservient male voice responds, "Yes, Mandy, right away!" Mandy adds, "And I don't want to see any streaks when I look at my reflection in the hood!" The focus shifts to a woman with long black hair and purple sunglasses driving the purple convertible, her expression changing from surprise to confidence as she interacts with a group of young men in colorful shirts. She playfully touches their cheeks, causing them to blush and develop heart-shaped eyes, indicating infatuation. Mandy commands, "You! Rotate my rims, defog my mirrors, and fluff my seat cushion, pronto!" The male voice replies, "Anything you say, Mandy!" Mandy then orders another, "You! Fill her up, and don't use any of that cheapo gas either!" Another male voice asks, "What can I do for you, Mandy?" Mandy, with a dramatic gasp, exclaims, "You! Can take a big step back! I have a polka-dot on striper restraining order, which you have clearly just violated!" The music intensifies with a dramatic flourish as the scene transitions to a park-like setting with palm trees and a fountain, where the woman continues to interact flirtatiously with various young men. She then turns and walks away, hand on her hip, as the camera follows. The final scenes show a wide view of a school courtyard with a fountain, where students socialize, and a man in a white uniform interacts with a girl in a pink dress near a car, all under a bright, sunny, and lively atmosphere, underscored by the continuing pop music.

event_blocks.summary: In a bustling school courtyard filled with students and the distant sound of a PA system announcing, "All right, so, like, welcome to Fem High, everyone!", a group of three girls, Mandy (black hair, orange jacket), Alex (long black hair, purple sunglasses), and Clover (dark hair, purple headband), walk together, discussing plans for the first day with playful suggestions of "Trample the football captain's heart? Shake down the geek squad for homework assignments?" before one declares she has "something else in mind." An urgent PA announcement, "All new students need to totally report to the principal's office like ASAP," causes one girl to exclaim "Sorry!" followed by a "Hmm" sound. The scene then shifts to a grand, ornate room with red walls and gold trim, where the five girls, now joined by a blonde girl in a pink top and a red-haired girl in a teal top, are sneaking around. They are startled, falling to the floor with a crash, scattering their books and phones. The blonde girl, a transfer student, exclaims in surprise, "Um... What excuse me, Alex? Clover? What are you guys doing here? I go here! I just transferred." The red-haired girl adds, "Awesome! Me too!" and Mandy chimes in, "Me three!" One girl remarks on the "biggest cosmic coincidence of the century," with another agreeing, "Totally! It's almost like we were meant to hang out together." Their nervous amusement is interrupted by the appearance of a stern-looking woman with pink hair and a monocle, dressed in a dark green uniform, observing them with a disapproving expression, her presence creating a tense atmosphere, followed by a final male "Hmm" sound.

School Courtyard.description: A bright, sunny school courtyard with a large fountain, surrounded by white buildings with arched windows and green lawns, where students are casually walking and socializing.

Ornate Room.description: A grand, luxurious room with red walls, gold trim, a chandelier, and classical busts, serving as the setting for the girls' sneaking adventure.

Group of Young Men.description: A group of young men in colorful shirts, including one in a pink floral shirt and others in orange, blue, and green, who are seen in the background of the school courtyard, though not interacting directly in this segment.

Red-Haired Woman.description: A young woman with long red hair, wearing a teal top, who is part of the group of girls sneaking around in the ornate room. She is identified as a transfer student, excitedly confirming she also just transferred by saying 'Awesome! Me too!'

Girl with Dark Hair and Purple Headband.description: A girl with dark hair and a purple headband, wearing a purple top, identified as Clover. She is part of the group of girls sneaking around in the ornate room and is later addressed by name by a transfer student.

Girl with Black Hair and Orange Jacket.description: A girl with short black hair, wearing an orange jacket with blue trim, identified as Mandy. She is part of the group of girls sneaking around in the ornate room, is addressed by name, and is identified as one of the three transfer students who exclaims 'Me three!'

Girl in Pink Dress.description: A girl with red hair, wearing a pink dress, who is seen briefly in the background of the school courtyard, walking with other students.

Blonde Woman in Pink Jacket.description: A young woman with blonde hair, wearing a pink top and purple belt, who is part of the group of girls sneaking around in the ornate room. She is identified as a transfer student, expressing surprise upon seeing Alex and Clover, and stating she just transferred.

Woman with Pink Hair and Monocle.description: A stern-looking woman with short pink hair, wearing a monocle and a dark green uniform, who stands with her arms crossed in the ornate room, observing the girls with a disapproving expression.

Woman with Long Black Hair and Purple Su.description: A woman with long black hair, wearing purple sunglasses perched on her head and a white shirt, identified as Alex, who is seen walking confidently with a group of girls in the school courtyard and is later addressed by name by a transfer student.

Shake down the geek squad for homework assignments?" before declaring she has "something else in mind."
